title: Spicy Smoky Fish Fritters
description: Crispy Thai-style fritters filled with smoky fish, served with a side of hot sauce.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine fish, flour, hot sauce, and eggs. Mix well.
Heat oil in a deep frying pan over medium-high heat.
Using a spoon, drop small amounts of the mixture into the hot oil.
Fry the fritters for 3-4 minutes on each side, until golden brown.
Remove the fritters from the oil and place them on a paper towel-lined plate.
Serve the fritters hot with a side of hot sauce.
